name: wave-realtime-edge
purpose: Edge WebRTC SFU for browser-first, bidirectional interactive media — rooms, calls, and voice agents. Layer 1 of the WAVE Protocol Plane.

capabilities.does: Unconditional liveness check, GET /health, no auth
IETF WHIP v1 ingest: POST /v1/whip/publish, PATCH/DELETE /v1/whip/resource/{id}
IETF WHEP v1 egress: POST /v1/whep/subscribe, PATCH/DELETE /v1/whep/resource/{id}
Custom SFU on a Cloudflare Durable Object (ROOM binding) for multi-party media

claims.text: Worker is routed on the custom domain rt.wave.online
Protocol requests carry a wave-token-v1 Bearer token, forwarded untouched to the gateway
Publishes rtc.session.opened and rtc.session.closed as x402-metered events
WHIP_INGEST_ENABLED is armed ("1") in the deployed wrangler.toml env
WHEP_EGRESS_ENABLED is armed ("1") in the deployed wrangler.toml env
Presence route is gated by PRESENCE_ENABLED, which is absent from wrangler.toml (default off)
Repo is tagged protocol-plane-layer-1 in capabilities.json

endpoints.does: WHIP ingest offer handshake -> 201 + SDP answer
WHIP teardown, stops the ingest meter
WHEP egress offer handshake -> 201 + SDP answer
WHEP teardown, stops the egress meter
WebSocket upgrade for room presence/state-sync (PRESENCE_ENABLED gated)
